name: Our Way
short_description: Enjoy Horror with a breathtaking atmosphere with an emphasis on quality sound processing. Feel the fear through ubiquitous pitfalls and through questions about your own life. The game is based on well-known horror elements such as inventory, batteries and loss of life.
detailed_description:
Our Way is a First-Person horror from the independent studio Eternity Studios. The story is based on what can really happen to all of us. Our Way will play with your mind and encourage you to ask yourself the questions of life.

There are 5 parts in the game in which you find yourself, each with its own point:

Repeating rooms - You keep repeating something in your life that you don't like

Haunted house where alcohol / Mannequins are everywhere - You drink because something in your life keeps recurring and alcohol caused the car accident. Mannequins are trying to wake you up scared so you don't go crazy and live on.

A cellar - where you can see a mutant that is frozen and creating those mannequins.

Maze - You don't know what you want in life, you can't find your place.

Hospital - Your last chance to wake up from a bad dream.

You will find out what will happen at the end of the game
